sections.paragraph:
f. with suff. שְׁאֵלָתִי, שֶׁאֱלָתָם Psa 106:15 and contr. שֵׁלָתֵךְ 1Sa 1:17.

(1) request, petition, prayer. There is said, שְׁאֵלָה שָׁאַל to ask a petition, i.e. ask something from any one, and to pour out prayer, Jud. 8:24 1Ki 2:16 נָתַן שׁ׳ to grant a petition, Est 5:6, בָּאָה שְׁאֵלָה the petition is granted, Job 6:8.

(2) loan, thing lent, 1Sa 2:20. Compare the root No. 2, a.
